title: Sticherus gnidioides
taxonomy: Sticherus gnidioides is a species of fern in the family Gleicheniaceae. This classification indicates its placement within the broader botanical hierarchy. Specifically, it belongs to the order Gleicheniales, which is a group of ferns that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Within the Gleicheniaceae family, Sticherus gnidioides is one of several species that are characterized by their unique leaf morphology. Further classification within the kingdom and phylum levels would place it as a vascular plant within the kingdom Plantae and division Pteridophyta.
